title: Valjevo, Kolubara — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Valjevo, Kolubara: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Valjevo is a city in Kolubara with a population of 59,000. A city in western Serbia on the Kolubara River, known for its 19th-century architecture, the nearby Petnica Science Center, and the Divčibare mountain resort.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
